title: fragaria vesca moschata
intro: Fragaria vesca moschata, also known as the wood strawberry or wild strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The wood strawberry offers various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Fragaria vesca moschata can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote overall well-being and reduce stress.
